config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the state or the majority. In my view, a healthy society protects basic individual rights first, then limits them only when there is a clear and necessary public reason. Social order matters, but it should not be used to silence minorities or justify unfair treatment.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh diposisikan di atas hak individu secara otomatis, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa. Hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum yang adil, dan perlindungan dari diskriminasi harus menjadi batas yang kuat, bukan sesuatu yang bisa dikorbankan setiap kali mayoritas merasa tidak nyaman. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi hanya sah jika pembatasan terhadap individu benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” hanya menjadi slogan yang menutupi penindasan terhadap kelompok kecil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from Indonesia, I have seen how easily appeals to “public order” or “the common good” can be used to pressure minorities and excuse unfair treatment, so I do not trust that phrase on its own. Society does matter, especially in a country that values harmony, but real harmony is not built by sacrificing basic rights whenever the majority feels inconvenient. Individual rights should be the default boundary, and any limit on them must be narrow, necessary, and truly accountable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena dalam pengalaman Amerika saya, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa oleh mayoritas atau negara. Saya tidak menolak kepentingan publik; saya hanya menuntut agar pembatasan hak individu benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan bisa diuji secara ketat, terutama untuk hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan perlindungan dari diskriminasi. Kalau tidak ada batas yang tegas, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi dalih untuk membungkam kelompok kecil. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi hak individu lebih dulu, lalu membatasi hanya saat ada alasan publik yang sangat kuat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society’s interests should take priority over individual rights as a general rule. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony and public order, but I have also seen how those ideas can be stretched to pressure minorities or excuse unfair treatment, so I am wary of giving “the common good” automatic supremacy. Rights should be the starting point, and limits on them should only be accepted when they are clearly necessary, proportional, and accountable. Without that, society’s interests can become a convenient label for majority power rather than genuine public welfare.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu. Pengalaman politik di sini menunjukkan bahwa alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan yang berlebihan, terutama terhadap minoritas atau orang yang tidak populer. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus diuji ketat: perlu, proporsional, dan tidak merusak hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan perlindungan dari diskriminasi. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin melindungi hak individu sambil membatasi hanya ketika benar-benar ada alasan yang kuat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
